firmadoc-review-and-sign: Please review the document and sign it below
firmadoc-available-after-signing: The document will be available after signing
firmadoc-link-not-exists: This signature link does not exist.
firmadoc-not-your-turn: It is not your turn to sign yet. You will receive an email when it is time.
firmadoc-already-signed-thanks: You have already signed this document. Thank you!
firmadoc-document-already-signed: This document has already been signed.
firmadoc-document-rejected-reason: This document was rejected for the following reason:
firmadoc-link-expired: This link has expired. Contact the company to receive a new one.
firmadoc-note-original-document: Note: The document shown below is the original without signatures. Electronic signatures will be added to the document once all signers have completed the process. This signing process has full legal validity under Regulation (EU) 910/2014 (eIDAS).
firmadoc-browser-no-preview: Your browser does not support the preview.
firmadoc-draw-signature: Draw your signature in the box:
firmadoc-sign-with-certificate: Sign with your electronic certificate installed in the browser (national ID, FNMT, etc.).
firmadoc-legal-consent: and I give my consent for the electronic signature of this document.
firmadoc-observations-placeholder: Add any comment or condition before signing...
firmadoc-dont-want-to-sign: I do not want to sign this document
firmadoc-reject-reason-help: Please tell us the reason so we can assist you properly.
firmadoc-please-name-and-reason: Please provide your name and the reason for rejection.
firmadoc-rejected-notified: You have rejected the document. We have notified the company.
firmadoc-please-sign: Please provide your signature to continue.
firmadoc-signed-partial: You have signed successfully! (%signed% of %total% signers). The process will continue with the next signer.
firmadoc-signed-complete-multi: Document fully signed! (%total% of %total% signers). Thank you all!
firmadoc-save-error: Error saving the signature. Please try again.
firmadoc-email-rejected-body: The client has rejected signing the document %type% %code%.
firmadoc-email-signed-body: The client has signed the document %type% %code%.
firmadoc-no-email-config: FirmaDoc: No email configuration to notify the company.
firmadoc-error-notification: FirmaDoc: Error sending notification to company: %error%
firmadoc-could-not-load-client: Could not load the signing client.
firmadoc-alert-draw-signature: Please draw your signature in the box.
firmadoc-alert-select-certificate: Please select your digital certificate before signing.
firmadoc-config-needed-desc: The browser blocks communication with AutoFirma due to its security certificate.
firmadoc-change-method-warning: Changing the signing method will cancel the previously selected digital certificate. If you wish to return to digital certificate signing, you will need to select the certificate again.
firmadoc-cert-field-locked: Field locked: data obtained from the accredited digital certificate
firmadoc-cert-mobile-desc: To sign with a digital certificate from your mobile you need the AutoFirma app installed. If you don't have it, download it from your app store:
firmadoc-cert-mobile-not-installed: Could not connect to AutoFirma. Install the app from your app store and try again:
firmadoc-cert-win-5: Restart your browser and try again
firmadoc-cert-mac-3: Double-click the imported certificate → expand Trust → set to Always Trust
firmadoc-cert-mac-4: Restart your browser and try again
firmadoc-cert-linux-2: Restart your browser and try again
firmadoc-cert-ff-4: Check Trust this CA to identify websites → OK
firmadoc-error-sending-emails: FirmaDoc: Error sending emails on generation - %error%
firmadoc-email-your-turn: It is your turn to sign
firmadoc-email-doc-ready: The document %type% %code% is ready for your signature.
firmadoc-email-next-signer: FirmaDoc: Link sent to next signer: %email%
firmadoc-email-confirmation-sent: FirmaDoc: Confirmation email sent to all signers.
firmadoc-pdf-certifies-signature: This document certifies the signature made on the attached document
firmadoc-pdf-legal-accepted: The signer declares having read and accepted the content of the document.
firmadoc-pdf-eidas-valid: Valid signature under eIDAS Regulation (EU 910/2014). Hash: %hash%
firmadoc-cron-signer-reminders-count: FirmaDoc: %count% reminder(s) sent to individual signers.
firmadoc-cron-signer-reminder-error: FirmaDoc Cron: Error in signer reminder - %error%
firmadoc-admin-sign-modes-help: Enable the modes you want to offer the client. If more than one is active, the client can choose their preference.
firmadoc-admin-handwritten-desc: The client draws their signature with finger or mouse
firmadoc-admin-typographic-desc: Typographic signature generated from the name
firmadoc-admin-certificate-desc: Signature with electronic certificate. ID number required.
firmadoc-admin-nif-cert-note: If digital certificate is active, it will always be required.
firmadoc-admin-active-docs-help: Enable FirmaDoc only on the document types you need.
firmadoc-admin-docs-note: The signature tab will only appear on documents of the enabled types. Support for other plugins (contracts, services, etc.) will be added in future versions.
firmadoc-admin-reminders-help: If the client does not sign, a reminder email is sent automatically.
firmadoc-admin-reminders-info: Enter how many days before the link expires you want to send reminders. Write the days separated by commas, from highest to lowest.
firmadoc-admin-days-example: E.g.: 7,3,1 = a reminder 7 days before, another at 3, and another the day before.
firmadoc-admin-notify-on-sign: Notify company email when a signature is received
firmadoc-admin-notify-help: The email configured in the FacturaScripts company profile will be used automatically.
firmadoc-admin-additional-email-help: If you want the notification to also reach another recipient.
firmadoc-admin-show-logo-help: The logo configured in FacturaScripts will be used.
firmadoc-admin-legal-help: You can use an external URL, write the text directly, both or neither. If legal text is configured, the client must accept it before signing.
firmadoc-admin-legal-url-help: The client will see: "I have read and accept the terms and conditions" with link.
firmadoc-admin-legal-text-help: If filled in, it will appear as a collapsible block before the checkbox.
firmadoc-admin-whatsapp-plain: Plain text only. WhatsApp does not support HTML formatting.
firmadoc-admin-confirm-help: This email is automatically sent to all signers and the company when the signing process is complete. Also sent when there is a single signer.
firmadoc-admin-confirm-link-note: {{link_documento}} = link to the complete signed PDF.
firmadoc-send-signature-voided: The previous signature was voided because the document was modified. Please generate a new link and resend it to the client.
firmadoc-send-link-generated: Link generated successfully. You can now send it to the client.
firmadoc-send-link-error: Error generating the link. Please try again.
firmadoc-send-no-active: This document does not have any active signature request yet.
firmadoc-send-phone-help: Include the country prefix without + (e.g.: 34 for Spain)
firmadoc-send-cancel-confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this signature request?
firmadoc-send-phone-needed: Enter a phone number to send via WhatsApp
firmadoc-send-add-phone: Add the client's phone number to enable WhatsApp.
firmadoc-send-wa-preview-help: The client will receive this message with the signature link.
firmadoc-signature-voided-doc: Signature voided: Document %code% was modified after being signed.
firmadoc-email-send-failed: Could not send the email. Check the email configuration in FacturaScripts.
firmadoc-link-generated-sent: ✓ Signature link generated and email sent in %mode% mode to: %emails%
firmadoc-link-generated-sent-single: ✓ Signature link generated and email sent to: %emails%
firmadoc-doc-not-editable: Cannot request signature: the document is not in an editable state.
firmadoc-verify-subtitle: Check the authenticity of a signed document
firmadoc-verify-not-found: No document was found with this verification code.
firmadoc-verify-verified-desc: This document was electronically signed and has not been modified since the signing date.
firmadoc-verify-pending-desc: This document has an active signature request but has not been signed yet.
firmadoc-verify-voided-desc: The document was modified after being signed, so the signature has been voided.
